title: equisetum ramosissimum var. multicaule
intro: Equisetum ramosissimum var. multicaule, also known as the jointed horsetail, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Equisetaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to support urinary health, relieve joint pain, and act as a natural diuretic. Equisetum ramosissimum var. multicaule is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction, and is also used in capsule or powder form as a dietary supplement.
